name: Aphmau and friends
description:
It was a peaceful night, the girls had a sleepover together while boys were sleeping in their rooms

Characters: Aphmau, Kawaii~Chan, Aaron, Noi, Zane, Ein, Mac, Kim, Wyatt, Blaze, Gene, Cadenza, Nicole, Dante, Travis, Laurence, and Garroth

The night was good, sleeping sounds, gaming sounds, and soft laughter's until...
